name: Smono 5 - Mouthpiece Screen
summary: Ensure the longevity of your Smono 5 with the help of these Mouthpiece Screens.
description: Ensure the longevity of your Smono 5 with the help of these Mouthpiece Screens. Designed to fit inside the mouthpiece, these screens effectively block any herbs from entering the mouthpiece. Compatibility: Smono 5 Mouthpiece This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
